name: imagepro
description: 跨平台桌面端图片对比工具

scripts.dev: concurrently -n renderer,electron "vite" "wait-on http://localhost:5173 && vite build --config vite.electron.config.ts --watch" "electron ."
scripts.build: vite build && vite build --config vite.electron.config.ts && electron-builder
scripts.preview: vite build && vite build --config vite.electron.config.ts && electron .
